name: PearCircle Seeder
compose:
name: slashnode-pearcircle-seeder
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/peerloomllc/pearcircle-seeder:1.0.17
    container_name: pearcircle-seeder
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      SEEDER_HOST: 0.0.0.0
      SEEDER_PORT: '8730'
      SEEDER_NO_AUTH: '1'
      SEEDER_NO_UPDATE_CHECK: '1'
    volumes:
      - app_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8731:8730
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data:
    name: slashnode-pearcircle-seeder_app_data
